title: Elbaf’s Children Become Targets
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Saul, Unknown person #8, Robin, Unknown person #9 as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So, even you warriors study hard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mr. Saul is primarily a history teacher, but he also teaches us about various books.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is Warrior Springs, and by the Waterside...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...is the the the the the the the owl library.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Spring?! It looks like it leads to a beach!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right! It's a beach formed from broken off parts of the tree.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no tide, but that waterfall at the source is always making waves.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We gotta bring Saul back to the tavern!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's fallen, and he can't get up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Seriously?! We came just to see him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a reunion 22 years in the making, and he just collapsed?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm a doctor!! I'll examine him right away!! Where is he?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get him all fixed up, chopper!! Everything's riding on you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He just fell all of a sudden!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: it's fine. I'll go to him on my own.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And to think I got all worked up over nothing.

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
